criteria.evidence_or_blocker: W045 emits a service envelope through the checked runner
W045 source index binds W045 residual obligations, W044 service evidence, W045 proof/model evidence, W045 Stage 2 service gates, W044 pack blockers, and W073 formatting intake
local harness register is runnable for artifact orchestration but not an operated service endpoint
local harness records eight deterministic operations for source, history, witness, alert, cross-engine, and no-proxy guard orchestration
service-readable run queue manifest is declared in the envelope, but not operated as a scheduler
deterministic retained-history query API contract is emitted with store and query rows
replay-correlation rows are emitted for W045 service obligations, Stage 2 service gates, proof/model inputs, local harness, and W073 guard evidence
retained-witness lifecycle rows are registered without pack eligibility promotion
retention SLO policy is declared for retained-history and retained-witness lifecycle evidence
local alert/quarantine dispatch contract is evaluated against service, retained-history, retained-witness, Stage 2, pack, proof/model, harness, and W073 inputs
W045 local dispatch contract and source evidence produce no quarantine decisions
W045 binds file-backed cross-engine substrate and Stage 2 service dependency without service promotion
W045 dynamic transition evidence is bound as service-readiness input only
W045 Rust refinement rows are bound as service-readiness input only
W045 Lean/TLA bounded model rows are bound without promoting fairness or unbounded coverage
W045 Stage 2 service gate retains operated cross-engine service as an exact dependency
W045 Stage 2 retains retained-witness lifecycle and retention SLO as exact pack-grade replay dependencies
W045 Stage 2 and W044 pack decision retain pack-grade replay governance as a no-promotion dependency
W044 pack/C5 reassessment retains retained-history, retained-witness, retention SLO, alert, cross-engine, and pack-governance service blockers
W045 carries OxFml W073 typed_rule-only aggregate/visualization formatting guard and old-string non-interpretation evidence
downstream typed-rule request construction remains required but unverified by OxCalc and is routed to calc-zkio.8
file-backed and local-harness-only artifacts are not counted as operated service, pack, Stage 2, C5, or release-grade promotions
local harness is runnable but explicitly records no service endpoint, daemon, external dispatcher, retained-history endpoint, or retained-witness lifecycle endpoint
retained-history store, query-register, and replay-correlation rows are extended beyond W044 with W045 service and harness evidence
retained-witness lifecycle rows are extended beyond W044 while keeping pack eligibility at zero
local harness and run queue manifest are present, but no recurring scheduler, daemon, service endpoint, or operated queue exists
retained-history query contract is local-harness-backed and not an operated retained-history service endpoint
retained-witness lifecycle rows are present, but no lifecycle service or retention SLO enforcement exists
external alert/quarantine dispatcher contract is represented, but no external dispatcher or quarantine service is operated
cross-engine differential evidence remains file-backed rather than operated as a service
pack-grade replay governance service remains unpromoted and cannot be inferred from local retained-history, retained-witness, or harness artifacts
